tasks.subject: Task 1: deriveInitialStep pure helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A pure, unit-tested function mapping a resumed Night to the wizard step it should open on.

**Files:**
- Create: `mobile/lib/nightFlow.ts`
- Test: `mobile/lib/nightFlow.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- deriveInitialStep returns "recorded" when movie!==null, "pick" when movie===null && pickerId!==null, else "who".
- Step type exported as "who" | "pick" | "recorded".
- Table-driven test passes under node:test.

**Verify:** `cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/nightFlow.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/nightFlow.ts", "mobile/lib/nightFlow.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/nightFlow.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["deriveInitialStep returns recorded/pick/who per movie+pickerId", "Step type exported", "table-driven test passes"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wizard container + Who's here step + layout flip
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rewrite app/night.tsx as the wizard: data load + resume, explicit-start screen, Stepper/WizardFooter chrome, complete Who's here step; flip the night route to its own header. Pick/recorded branches render a temporary placeholder.

**Files:**
- Rewrite: `mobile/app/night.tsx`
- Modify: `mobile/app/_layout.tsx:38`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- No open night shows Start tonight's night; tapping creates tonight's night and lands on Who's here.
- Resume loads turn order and opens on deriveInitialStep(night).
- Who's here lists full roster as attendance toggles (present bright, absent dimmed); order[0] spotlighted GETS THE PICK.
- Footer CTA disabled until present core picker; pressing records pick and advances.
- just check passes.

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just check`; then `just start` walk Who's here.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/night.tsx", "mobile/app/_layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no-night start button creates tonight and lands on Who's here", "resume opens on deriveInitialStep with turn order", "attendance toggles wired; order[0] spotlighted GETS THE PICK", "footer records pick and advances; disabled until present picker", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: The pick step (search + picker correction)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the placeholder branch with PickStep: picker spotlight card, Choose who picks correction reveal over present attendees, and film search whose result selection attaches the movie and advances to Recorded.

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/app/night.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Pick step shows recorded picker (from night.pickerId) in ember spotlight card.
- Choose who picks reveals present attendees (incl. guests); tapping calls recordNightPick and collapses.
- Search calls searchMovies; results show poster + title + year; tapping attaches and advances.
- Search errors inline; controls disable while busy.
- just check passes.

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just check`; then `just start` walk correction + search + select.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/night.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["picker spotlight resolved from pickerId", "Choose who picks reveal records + collapses", "search results attach movie and advance", "search errors inline; controls disabled while busy", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: The Recorded step
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the recorded placeholder with RecordedStep: poster hero, RECORDED badge, title/year, picked-by line, who-watched avatar cluster, Done / Change movie footer actions.

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/app/night.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Recorded shows poster 150x222, solid RECORDED badge, serif title, mono year (omit when null), Picked by {name} · {date}.
- Who watched overlapping avatar cluster lists all night.attendees.
- Done calls router.back(); Change movie returns to pick step.
- just check passes.

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just check`; then `just start` complete a night + confirm hero/cluster + Change/Done + resume.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/night.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["poster 150x222 + RECORDED badge + title/year + picked-by", "who-watched cluster of all attendees", "Done -> router.back(); Change movie -> pick step", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
